# collapsible

## Plugin reference

- Description: Accessible collapsible primitive with controlled/uncontrolled support and a built-in chevron indicator. Compound components for standard layouts; useCollapsible hook for custom triggers.
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `CollapsibleProps`, `CollapsibleTriggerProps`, `CollapsibleContentProps`, `CollapsibleChevronProps`, `UseCollapsibleOptions`, `UseCollapsibleReturn`
  - Values: `Collapsible`, `CollapsibleTrigger`, `CollapsibleContent`, `CollapsibleChevron`, `useCollapsible`
